title: Chest pain
source_review_basis: committed exact-section summaries and evidence records; full guideline documents were not retained for this pass

red_flags.text: Defines chest-pain scope in DHA telehealth and emphasises potentially life-threatening causes and emergency exclusion.
red_flags.rationale: Defines the exact Dubai telehealth scope and emergency limitation for chest pain.
red_flags.evidence_extract: Defines chest-pain scope in DHA telehealth and emphasises potentially life-threatening causes and emergency exclusion.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Chest Pain – 45

red_flags.text: Lists life-threatening chest-pain patterns, associated breathlessness, syncope, diaphoresis, abnormal physiology, and emergency referral requirements.
red_flags.rationale: Directly supports mapped exertional, radiation, syncope, breathlessness, diaphoresis, and abnormal-physiology concern prompts.
red_flags.evidence_extract: Lists life-threatening chest-pain patterns, associated breathlessness, syncope, diaphoresis, abnormal physiology, and emergency referral requirements.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Chest Pain – 45

investigations.text: Specifies onset, site, character, radiation, severity, exertional and relieving factors, associated symptoms, duration, trauma, travel, and prior testing.
investigations.rationale: Directly supports mapped onset, location, character, radiation, exertional relationship, duration, associated symptoms, and relieving factors.
investigations.evidence_extract: Specifies onset, site, character, radiation, severity, exertional and relieving factors, associated symptoms, duration, trauma, travel, and prior testing.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Chest Pain – 45

investigations.text: Limits testing to the assessed presentation and lists blood studies, chest radiography, ECG, and echocardiography where clinically indicated.
investigations.rationale: Directly supports mapped clinician-selected ECG, chest imaging, and blood-test documentation.
investigations.evidence_extract: Limits testing to the assessed presentation and lists blood studies, chest radiography, ECG, and echocardiography where clinically indicated.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Chest Pain – 45
